ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend or hashtag */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the trend on Twitter */,
  "promoted_content" TEXT /* Promoted content associated with the trend */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query parameter used to search for the trend */,
  "tweet_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of tweets associated with the trend */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the place where the trend is trending */,
  "woeid" INTEGER /* Where On Earth ID for the place */,
  "as_of" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was last updated */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the trend */,
  "topic_model" TEXT /* Topic model used to categorize the trend */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the place is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the place is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the place */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the place */,
  "geo_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical location (e.g., city, country, region) */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Bounding box coordinates for the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_category_mapping" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the trend-category mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., tweet_volume, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the metric (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_performance_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a trend */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend or hashtag */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the trend on Twitter */,
  "promoted_content" TEXT /* Promoted content associated with the trend */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query parameter used to search for the trend */,
  "tweet_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of tweets associated with the trend */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the place where the trend is trending */,
  "woeid" INTEGER /* Where On Earth ID for the place */,
  "as_of" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_versions_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trend */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention of a trend */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "tweet_author" TEXT /* Author of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_mentions_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media content */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media content */,
  "media_size" REAL /* Size of the media content in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the media was uploaded */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Description of the media content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_media_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment" INTEGER /* Parent comment ID for nested comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_comments_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_ratings_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the trend */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the trend was shared (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL of the shared content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend was shared */,
  "share_text" TEXT /* Text accompanying the shared content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_shares_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_text" TEXT /* Text accompanying the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_modeling" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic model */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic model */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic model was created */,
  "model_text" TEXT /* Text accompanying the topic model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_modeling_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)
